operation.name: write_at_rotate
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun i () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert
        (bvult 
               (concat 
                       (select 
                               i
                               (_ bv7 32)
                       )
                       (concat 
                               (select 
                                       i
                                       (_ bv6 32)
                               )
                               (concat

                                               (_ bv5 32)
                                       )
                                       (concat 
                                               (select

                                                       (_ bv4 32)
                                               )
                                               (concat 
                                                       (select 
                                                               i
                                                               (_ bv3 32)
                                                       )
                                                       (concat 
                                                               (select 
                                                                       i
                                                                       (_ bv2 32)
                                                               )
                                                               (concat 
                                                                       (select 
                                                                               i
                                                                               (_ bv1 32)
                                                                       )
                                                                       (select 
                                                                               i
                                                                               (_ bv0 32)
                                                                       )
                                                               )
                                                       )
                                               )
                                       )
                               )
                       )
               )
               (_ bv4294967296 64)
        )
)
(check-sat)
(exit)

metadata.bug_type: CWE-787 (OOB_WRITE): Array index write where index is a length-like value (off-by-one / past-last-byte)
